mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node_config_snapshot WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND config_file_id = #{configFileId}
SELECT * FROM node_config_snapshot WHERE node_id = #{nodeId} AND config_file_id = #{configFileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node_config_snapshot (project_id, node_id, config_file_id, content_hash, content_size, sync_status, last_sync_time, update_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{nodeId}, #{configFileId}, #{contentHash}, #{contentSize}, #{syncStatus}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{updateTime})
